name: Vocabulary Quiz
description: Vocabulary quiz with visual card UI. Includes science and Spanish decks with 10 questions each. The LLM starts the quiz, relays student answers, and discusses results.

tools.name: start_quiz
tools.description: Start a vocabulary quiz session. Returns the first question and total count. Default deck is 'science'.

deck.description: Which vocabulary deck to use. Defaults to 'science'.

tools.name: check_answer
tools.description: Check the student's answer against the current question. Returns correct/incorrect, the right answer, and advances to the next question (or signals quiz complete).

answer.description: The student's answer to the current question

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Get current quiz progress: questions answered, correct count, and detailed list of results including missed questions with correct answers.
